parsed.availability_comment: Likely available for most IPL 2026 matches, but recent back recovery leaves some early-season/load-management risk.
parsed.availability_note: Back complaint ruled him out of Australia's final T20 World Cup 2026 squad, but February reporting said he was hopeful of being fit for IPL starting late March.
parsed.followup_reason: Need final pre-IPL fitness confirmation after February 2026 back-related setback.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: No meaningful overseas-slot pressure on his place.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Captain and premium overseas fast bowler; if fit, he takes one slot by default.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: SRH list him as captain; automatic XI pick when fit.
